name: Fat-Free Pineapple Upside Down Cake (Ovo Lact
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch cake pan with cooking spray.
2. In the pan, mix together brown sugar, corn syrup, and lemon juice until combined.
3. Place the mixture in a preheated oven at 350°F for 3 minutes.
4. Arrange pineapple rings and cherries on top of the mixture; set aside.
5. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt.
6. In a medium bowl, whisk together sugar and skim milk until the sugar is almost dissolved.
7. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla to the milk mixture; stir until blended.
8. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
9. Pour the batter into the pan.
10. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Immediately loosen the edge of the cake with a spatula and invert it onto a serving plate.
12. Remove the pan.
